title: Hypixel Lucky Blocks
description: An attempt at recreating the Lucky Blocks from Hypixel
body:
# Hypixel Lucky Blocks

This (W.I.P) mod attempts to add all of the content from Hypixel's lucky blocks.


Compatible with MrCrayfish's Catalogue Mod!


## Lucky Blocks

- Weaponry Lucky Block: In Progress
- Guardian Lucky Block: In Progress
- Insane Lucky Block: Not Started
- Crazy Lucky Block: Not Started
- Wild Lucky Block: Not Started
- OP Rule Lucky Block: In Progress




## Disclaimers!

- This mod is in beta and there may be many bugs. I am not responsible for damage to your worlds.

- The updates will be slow.
